Main - Materials - Polymer liners for trenchless repairs - Polymer sleeve SP!RES-Liner DN100 (4 mm wall)

Polymer sleeve SP!RES-Liner DN100 (4 mm wall)

SP!RES-Liner DN100 is a ready-to-use sleeve impregnated with a two-component heat-curing resin. Designed specifically for the restoration of pipes with a diameter of 100 mm by inversion using the SP!RES system.

The liner is a flexible sleeve made of high-strength polyester, reinforced for pressure resistance. The inner layer is covered with a smooth polymer film, which forms a perfectly smooth surface of the new pipe after polymerization.

Application:
  • Restoring home connections
  • Repair of sewer outlets from buildings
  • Rehabilitation of horizontal network sections
  • Removal of cracks, fistulas, and corrosion damage
Specifications:
Diameter (nominal)DN100
Wall thickness after polymerization4 mm
Length (available options)3 m, 6 m, 9 m, 12 m
Base materialPolyester (PES)
Resin TypeHeat-cured (unsaturated polyester)
Polymerization time at 80°C60 minutes
Max. operating temperature+50°C (short-term up to +80°C)
Stiffness classSN4 (on request SN8)
Display colorWhite (outer layer), blue (marker)
PackagingVacuum packaging + thermal container
